texto: Already, in the last few decades, you have realized the utter futility of of encumbering yourselves with superfluous possessions that have no useful virtue, but which, for various sentimental reasons, you continue to hoard, thus lessening your life's efficiency by using for it time and attention that should have been applied to the practical work of life's accomplishments. (The Miracle of the Lily - 1928)
explicacao: Orientação direta de Clare Winger Harris sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Already, in the last few decades, you have realized the utter futility of of encumbering yourselv…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, material-possessions, materialism, útil em momentos de trabalho e material-possessions.
